title: colchicum bertolonii subsp. stevenii
intro: Colchicum bertolonii subsp. stevenii, also known as autumn crocus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the lily family (Colchicaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Italy and the Balkans. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as arthritis, gout, and skin infections. The health benefits of Colchicum bertolonii subsp. stevenii include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and tissue repair. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and corms are often used to make tinctures, infusions, and creams, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
